title: olearia virgata
intro: Olearia virgata, also known as the coastal daisy bush, is a shrub native to eastern Australia that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Olearia virgata may include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. Olearia virgata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to the limited scientific research on its effects.
